creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sun Apr 21 18:31:29 2013
New Revision: 316192
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316192

Log:
  - Update to 2.1.5
  - Convert tab to space in pkg-descr
  
  PR:		ports/177975
  Submitted by:	Danilo Egea Gondolfo <danilogondolfo@gmail.com> (maintainer)
  Feature safe:	yes

Modified:
  head/dns/dnsjava/Makefile
  head/dns/dnsjava/distinfo
  head/dns/dnsjava/pkg-descr

Modified: head/dns/dnsjava/Makefile
==============================================================================

+++ head/dns/dnsjava/Makefile	Sun Apr 21 18:31:29 2013	(r316192)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dnsjava
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.4
+PORTVERSION=	2.1.5
 CATEGORIES=	dns java
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.dnsjava.org/download/

==============================================================================

+SHA256 (dnsjava-2.1.5.tar.gz) = cb255c310539e9286e05f0667c2c65a8ad0858b7313a3ed54e4fa588b30b41e8

Modified: head/dns/dnsjava/pkg-descr
==============================================================================

+++ head/dns/dnsjava/pkg-descr	Sun Apr 21 18:31:29 2013	(r316192)
@@ -15,4 +15,4 @@ simpler. A cache is used to reduce the n
 level functions allow direct manipulation of DNS messages and records, as well
 as allowing additional resolver properties to be set.

+WWW: http://www.xbill.org/dnsjava/
